# SpatialReflectionNavigationAgent3D.DistanceModeEnum enumeration

Options for distance function used for movement and heuristic.

```csharp
public enum DistanceModeEnum
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Euclidean | `0` | Straight-line distance (fastest, best for general use). |
| Manhattan | `1` | Axis-aligned distance (fast for grid-like layouts, less accurate in open 3D). |
